title: A cron-replacement digest. It only re-writes when the contract actually moves — quiet wakes cost nothing.

beats.name: cold
beats.caption: cold start · the gateway renders, its truth wakes the digest · two fresh renders

beats.name: quiet-skip
beats.caption: an identical re-wake · the gateway memo-SKIPS · moved[—] · fresh 0 · the digest never wakes

beats.name: surprise-render
beats.caption: the contract moves · the memo key MISSES · the gateway renders · the surprise propagates to the digest
